---
title: "Davis_ANERR Symposium_202602"
output: html_document
---

```{r VariableSet, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}
# Set your variables
ReportYear <- "2025" # Sets Year of Report
Database = "OysterLocalMD20251120"  # Set the local database to use
Server = "localhost\\LOCALSQL" # Set the local Server to use

```

```{r SetUp, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}
############
# 01
# Load necessary R packages
library(tidyverse) # Loads a number of very useful packages
library(odbc) # Necessary for loading data from SQL Server
library(DBI) # Necessary for loading data from SQL Server
library(dbplyr) # Necessary for loading data from SQL Server
library(lubridate) # Makes dealing with dates easier
library(knitr) # Allows Dynamic Report generation (knit)
library(rmarkdown) # Necessary for working with RMarkdown files
library(ggpubr) # Increases the flexibility of ggplot2 generated plots
library(patchwork) #Required for arranging multiple plots, more flexible
library(scales) # Improves scales in plot labels
library(plotrix) # needed for standard error calculations
library(glmmTMB) # needed for modeled means
library(DHARMa) # needed for model diagnostics
library(performance) # needed for model diagnostics
library(AICcmodavg) # needed for model selection
library(emmeans) # needed to extract modeled means and CI
library(openxlsx) # needed to read and write to Excel

# Set background variables
ReportStart <- as.Date(paste0(ReportYear, "-01-01"))
ReportEnd <- as.Date(paste0(ReportYear, "-12-31"))
Estuaries <- c("AB")

# Set data ranges
Years_WQ <- seq(2015, ReportYear)
Years_Survey <- seq(2015, ReportYear)
Years_Recruitment <- seq(2015, ReportYear)
Years_OyHealth <- seq(2016, ReportYear)

# Set important lists
lv3 <- c("West", "Central", "East")

# Configure chunks
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE)

############
############

############
############
# 02
# Create all Functions necessary for Report

# ----------------------------
# Function to extract diagnostics
# ----------------------------
extract_diagnostics <- function(model, model_name = "Model") {

  # 1. R-squared (handles NA for conditional R2)
  r2_vals <- performance::r2(model)
  r2_marg <- unname(r2_vals$R2_marginal)
  r2_cond <- if ("R2_conditional" %in% names(r2_vals)) unname(r2_vals$R2_conditional) else NA
  
  # 2. Dispersion parameter
  disp <- performance::check_overdispersion(model)$dispersion_ratio

  # 3. Return a one-row dataframe
  data.frame(
    Model = model_name,
    Num_Observations = nobs(model),
    R2_Marginal = r2_marg,
    R2_Conditional = r2_cond,
    Dispersion_Ratio = disp
  )
}

summarise_ALL <- function(data) {
  summarised_data <- data %>%
    summarise(NumLiveMean_raw = mean(NumLive, na.rm = TRUE),
              NumLiveSD_raw = sd(NumLive, na.rm = TRUE),
              TotalWeightMean_raw = mean(TotalWeight, na.rm = TRUE),
              TotalWeightSD_raw = sd(TotalWeight, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
    mutate(NumLiveDensityMean_raw = NumLiveMean_raw * 4,
           NumLiveDensitySD_raw = NumLiveSD_raw * 4,
           TotalWeightDensityMean_raw = TotalWeightMean_raw * 4,
           TotalWeightDensitySD_raw = TotalWeightSD_raw * 4)
  return(summarised_data)
}
############
############

############
############
# 03
# Set formatting for text and figures
#Base formatting for figure consistency
BaseForm <- theme_classic() +
  theme(panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA), #Add border
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0, vjust = -7, family = "serif", color = "black", size = 12), #Add plot title for section
        axis.title = element_text(family = "serif", color = "black", size = 12), #Adjust axis title and text
        axis.text = element_text(family = "serif", color = "black", size = 10),
        axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.20, "cm"),
        axis.ticks.length.y = unit(0.1, "cm"),
        legend.position = "top", legend.justification = "right",  legend.box.spacing = unit(0.05, "line"), #Adjust legend position
        legend.title = element_blank(), legend.key.height = unit(0.5, "line"), legend.key.width = unit(1, "lines"), #Adjust legend title and spacing
        legend.text = element_text(family = "serif", color = "black", size = 9)) #Adjust legend text
```

``` {r SetUp Data Load}
############
# 04
# Load Data

# Load Database Data
# Connect to Local database server and pull all necessary data, then close connection 
con <- dbConnect(odbc(),
                 Driver = "SQL Server", 
                 Server = Server,
                 Database = Database,
                 Authentication = "ActiveDirectoryIntegrated")

# Load Fixed location information
dboFixedLocations <- tbl(con,in_schema("dbo", "FixedLocations")) %>%
  collect() %>% 
  filter(Estuary %in% Estuaries)

# Disconnect from database
DBI::dbDisconnect(con)

# Load Excel Data
excel_file_path <- "C:/Users/Matthew.Davis/OneDrive - Florida Fish and Wildlife Conservation/Survey_2025_temp.xlsx"
xlSurveyQuadrat <- read.xlsx(excel_file_path, sheet = 1) 

QuadStats0 <- read.xlsx("QuadStats1.xlsx") %>%
  mutate(TripDate = as.Date(as.numeric(TripDate), origin = "1900-01-01"))

############
############

############
############
# 05
# Apply basic filters to data
# Filter data frames so that only data collected for inclusion in the Report are present.

### Location Data ###
FixedLocations1 <- dboFixedLocations %>% 
  mutate(StationNumber = as.numeric(StationNumber),
         DateLastCultched = as.Date(DateLastCultched),
         SectionName = case_when(
           SectionName == "W" ~ "West",
           SectionName == "C" ~ "Central",
           SectionName == "E" ~ "East",
           TRUE ~ SectionName)) %>%
  select(FixedLocationID,
         Estuary,
         SectionName,
         StationName,
         ParcelName,
         StationNumber,
         StationNameNumber,
         DateLastCultched,
         ParcelArea) %>% 
  distinct()

    ### Remove intermediate data frames
rm(dboFixedLocations)
###

### Survey Data ###
    ### QUADRATS ###  
    # Excel Quadrats #
Quadrats_xl <- xlSurveyQuadrat %>%
  mutate(
    FixedLocationID = str_pad(FixedLocationID, width = 4, side =  c("left"), pad = c("0")),
    TripDate = as.Date("2025-05-15"),
    Year = 2025) %>%
  left_join(FixedLocations1, by = c("FixedLocationID")) %>%
  mutate(TimeSinceCultched = as.numeric(interval(DateLastCultched, TripDate), "years")) %>%
  mutate(ProjectGroup = case_when(
    grepl("RESTORE", StationName) ~ "RESTORE-2017",
    grepl("NFWF", StationName) & Year < 2019 ~ "NFWF-2015",
    grepl("SBM Hotel", StationName) | grepl("SBM Bulkhead", StationName) ~ "Historic Uncultched",
    grepl("SBM", StationName) & Year >= 2021 & TimeSinceCultched > 0 ~ "NFWF-2021",
    TRUE ~ "Historic Uncultched")) %>%
  select(FixedLocationID,
         TripDate,
         Estuary,
         SectionName,
         StationName,
         StationNumber,
         ParcelName,
         StationNameNumber,
         ProjectGroup,
         TimeSinceCultched,
         Year,
         NumLive,
         TotalWeight,
         NumLegal)

QuadStats <- union(QuadStats0, Quadrats_xl) 



    ### SHELL HEIGHTS ###
    # Survey SHELL HEIGHTS #

    ###

    ### Remove intermediate data frames

rm(QuadStats0, Quadrats_xl, xlSurveyQuadrat)

```

# Perform basic analyses, output figures and tables for Survey data



``` {r SampleWeightStats}
# Analysis indicates that Historic and Restoration data should be modeled separately

# Figure out which data distribution to use
# Historic
hist(subset(QuadStats, ProjectGroup == "Historic Uncultched")$TotalWeight)
# NFWF-2021
hist(subset(QuadStats, ProjectGroup == "NFWF-2021")$TotalWeight) 
# RESTORE-2017
hist(subset(QuadStats, ProjectGroup == "RESTORE-2017")$TotalWeight)

### Historic Model ###
# Gamma out performed Gaussian
# Zero-inflation did not improve model fit
# Leaving out Random effect of Location was very detrimental to the model
TotalWeight_Historic <- glmmTMB(TotalWeight ~ factor(Year) + (1 | FixedLocationID), # Best
                      family = Gamma(link = "log"), 
                      data = QuadStats,
                      subset = ProjectGroup == "Historic Uncultched")

# Check goodness of fit
simulateResiduals(TotalWeight_Historic, n = 1000, plot = T)

### Restoration Model ###
## NFWF-2021 ##
# Gaussian out performed Gamma
# Zero-inflation did not improve model fit
# Leaving out Random effect of Location was very detrimental to the model

TotalWeight_NFWF2021 <- glmmTMB(TotalWeight ~ factor(Year) + (1 | FixedLocationID), # Best
                      family = gaussian(link = "identity"), 
                      data = QuadStats,
                      subset = ProjectGroup == "NFWF-2021")

# Check goodness of fit
simulateResiduals(TotalWeight_NFWF2021, n = 1000, plot = T)

## RESTORE-2017 ##
# Replicated NFWF code

TotalWeight_RESTORE2017 <- glmmTMB(TotalWeight ~ (1 | FixedLocationID), # Best
                      family = gaussian(link = "identity"), 
                      data = QuadStats,
                      subset = ProjectGroup == "RESTORE-2017")

# Check goodness of fit
simulateResiduals(TotalWeight_RESTORE2017, n = 1000, plot = T)


# Look at summaries
summary(TotalWeight_Historic)
summary(TotalWeight_NFWF2021)
summary(TotalWeight_RESTORE2017)

# Create dataframe to store 
####### Put the modeled means into a data frame for plotting
TotalWeightStats_historic <- emmeans(TotalWeight_Historic, ~ Year, type = "response") %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  mutate(ProjectGroup = "Historic Uncultched") 

TotalWeightStats_nfwf2021 <- emmeans(TotalWeight_NFWF2021, ~ Year, type = "response") %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  mutate(ProjectGroup = "NFWF-2021") %>%
  rename(response = emmean)

TotalWeightStats_restore2017 <- emmeans(TotalWeight_RESTORE2017, ~ 1, type = "response") %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  mutate(ProjectGroup = "RESTORE-2017") %>%
  rename(response = emmean)



TotalWeightStats_modeled <- bind_rows(TotalWeightStats_historic, TotalWeightStats_nfwf2021, TotalWeightStats_restore2017) %>%
  rename(TotalWeightMean_modeled = response,
         TotalWeightLower_modeled = asymp.LCL,
         TotalWeightUpper_modeled = asymp.UCL) %>%
  mutate(TotalWeightMeanDensity_modeled = round((TotalWeightMean_modeled * 4), 1),
         TotalWeightLowerDensity_modeled = round((TotalWeightLower_modeled * 4), 1),
         TotalWeightUpperDensity_modeled = round((TotalWeightUpper_modeled * 4), 1)) %>%
  select(-SE, -df) %>%
  mutate(TotalWeightUpperDensity_modeled = case_when(
    TotalWeightMean_modeled <= 0 ~ 0,
    TRUE ~ TotalWeightUpperDensity_modeled
  ))

# Generate raw mean and SD
TotalWeightStats_RAW <- QuadStats %>%
  group_by(Year, 
           ProjectGroup) %>%
  summarise_ALL() %>%
  arrange(Year,
          ProjectGroup) %>%
  select(-matches("Num"))

 

#  # Create a complete grid for all years, sections, and projects
# df_complete <- expand_grid(Year = Years_Survey, SectionName = lv3, ProjectGroup = unique(NumLiveStats_ALL$ProjectGroup)) %>%
#     left_join(NumLiveStats_ALL, by = c("Year", "SectionName", "ProjectGroup")) %>% 
#     mutate(has_data = !is.na(RawOysterDensityMean), # Add a flag for missing data
#            SectionName = factor(SectionName, levels = lv3))


```
